Author: mithro_
Content:
@carlfk - Basically, the connection between ten64 (the gateway) and tweed's uplink port should be a *different* vlan to tweed's local port and the RPis so I end up with:

  [tfpgas.ten64] <-- tfpga vlan on switches --> [eth-uplink.tweed : eth-local.tweed] <-- fpga vlan on S3300-1 --> [RPis]

Author: carlfk
Content: A picture would answer these questions

Author: carlfk
Content: is  "tfpga vlan on switches" include the - ":fpga vlan on S3300-1"  ?

Author: carlfk
Content: the PoE control code can and does have "turn off all the PoE on all the ports" which might brick the thing until pull the power cord and maybe poke the reset hole
